character.name:
Isometric pixel art character, 3/4 front-facing pose, 64x64 sprite.
  ▎                                                                                                            
  ▎ A gaunt, hunched leper-necromancer wrapped in filthy grey-green burial bandages, tattered hooded robe
  ▎ stained with mildew and dried blood. Skin a sickly olive-green (#6B7F4F), mottled with black rot patches
  ▎ and weeping sores. One eye milky-white and bulging, the other sunken into a black socket. Stringy hair
  ▎ matted under the hood. Exposed ribs visible through torn wrappings.
  ▎
  ▎ Key detail: his LEFT arm is ripped clean off at the shoulder — a ragged stump trailing sinew and dripping
  ▎ dark ichor. He grips the severed arm in his RIGHT hand like a club, bone protruding from the torn end,
  ▎ fingers still twitching. Swinging pose, mid-combat.
  ▎
  ▎ Wreathed in curling puffs of sickly yellow-green stink vapor and swirling motes of black decay magic. Faint
  ▎  necrotic glow around the stump. Flies orbiting him.
  ▎
  ▎ Palette: moldy green #6B7F4F, muddy brown #8B5A2B, deep swamp #3F4F2F, bone white, bruise purple accents.
  ▎ Limited 16-color pixel palette, crisp dithering, no anti-aliasing. Dark fantasy MUD aesthetic, Diablo 1 /
  ▎ Ultima Online vibe.
